summary: Both REQ-1 and REQ-2 appear to be implemented in ContactPage.tsx. The file-summaries.txt explicitly confirms that '– ganz ohne Kosten' was removed from the 'Wichtig zu wissen' box and '– kostenlos' was removed from the 'Termin buchen' card. The diff shows ContactPage.tsx was modified, and only ContactPage.tsx (plus the summary/state files) were changed, consistent with the constraint of only modifying ContactPage.tsx.
